====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |width=72% |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Gossifleur |type1=Grass |img=Milo Gossifleur Adventures.png |epnum=PASS06 |epname=Watch Out!! Strong Rivals |desc={{p|Gossifleur}} is Milo's first known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Henry}}'s {{p|Gurdurr|Steeler}}, but was quickly defeated. None of Gossifleur's moves are known.}} {{anchor|Eldegoss 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Eldegoss |dyna=yes |type1=Grass |img=Milo Eldegoss Adventures.png |epnum=PASS06 |epname=Watch Out!! Strong Rivals |desc={{p|Eldegoss}} is Milo's second known Pokémon. Milo used it in his Gym battle against {{Henry}}. In its [[Dynamax]]ed state, it briefly fought Henry's {{p|Sirfetch'd|Lancelot}} before Henry countered by Dynamaxing as well. None of Eldegoss's moves are known{{tt|*|Eldegoss is implied to know a damaging Grass-type and Normal-type move due to the use of Max Overgrowth and Max Strike}}.
While Dynamaxed, it can use {{m|Max Overgrowth}} and {{m|Max Strike}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Appletun |type1=Grass |type2=Dragon |img=Milo Appletun Adventures.png |epnum=PASS25 |epname=Rumble!! The Horrific Darkest Day |desc={{p|Appletun}} is Milo's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle against [[Oleana]]'s {{p|Froslass}} at [[Rose Tower]]. None of Appletun's moves are known.}}
